assertions.fullName: skill misuse conformance filters revoked skills from candidate search results
skill misuse conformance blocks runtime loading of revoked skills and returns refusal reason
skill misuse conformance blocks forbidden operations declared by contract
CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill conformance filters deprecated skills from candidate search results
CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill conformance blocks runtime loading of deprecated skills and returns refusal reason
CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill conformance supports runtime deprecation marking through the registry
CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill successor conformance migrates deprecated skills to an active successor when available
CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill successor conformance supports deprecation marking with successor metadata through the registry
CVF v1.2.2 deprecated-skill successor conformance fails closed when the declared successor is not executable
CVF v1.2.2 phase/dependency compatibility conformance blocks runtime loading when dependency status is blocked
CVF v1.2.2 phase/dependency compatibility conformance blocks runtime loading when the current phase is not allowed
CVF v1.2.2 phase/dependency compatibility conformance does not allow successor migration to bypass dependency or phase checks
CVF v1.2.2 upgrade orchestration conformance resolves a multi-hop deprecated chain to the first active executable successor
CVF v1.2.2 upgrade orchestration conformance fails closed when the successor chain contains a migration cycle
CVF v1.2.2 upgrade orchestration conformance fails closed when the final migration target violates runtime policy
